title: Advanced Cooking Skills
description: This lesson covers advanced techniques such as sous-vide cooking, fermentation, and complex flavor building.

steps.instruction: Understand the sous-vide technique and its benefits.
Learn how to set up a sous-vide bath.
Practice cooking a steak using sous-vide.
Explore fermentation basics and how to ferment vegetables.
Experiment with flavor building using herbs and spices.

safety_notes: Always follow food safety guidelines when cooking and handling food.
